task_completion.description: Verify clinical bookmarks are organized into specific folders and personal bookmarks are removed
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) or Bookmarks Bar showing folders named 'Clinical Portals', 'Patient Education', and 'Crisis Resources'. There should be no personal bookmarks (e.g., Netflix, Amazon, Facebook) visible.

task_completion.description: Verify history is cleared of personal domains but retains clinical records
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome History page (chrome://history) showing clinical domains (e.g., simplepractice.com, doxy.me) but completely lacking personal domains (e.g., netflix.com, amazon.com, facebook.com).

task_completion.description: Verify Camera and Microphone permissions are granted to doxy.me
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Site Settings for doxy.me (chrome://settings/content/siteDetails?site=https%3A%2F%2Fdoxy.me) showing both 'Camera' and 'Microphone' dropdowns set to 'Allow'.

task_completion.description: Verify custom search engine for DSM is configured
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Search Engine settings (chrome://settings/searchEngines) showing a site search entry with keyword 'dsm' and the URL 'https://www.psychiatryonline.org/action/doSearch?AllField=%s'.

task_completion.description: Verify password saving and address autofill are disabled
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Password Manager settings showing 'Offer to save passwords' toggled off, AND Addresses and more settings (chrome://settings/addresses) showing 'Save and fill addresses' toggled off.

task_completion.description: Verify the default download location is updated to Patient_Handouts
task_completion.visual_evidence: Chrome Downloads settings (chrome://settings/downloads) showing the 'Location' path ending in 'Documents/Patient_Handouts'.

task_completion.description: Verify the setup_complete.txt file is created with the correct text
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Desktop/setup_complete.txt' containing exactly the text 'Telehealth setup verified'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Chrome GUI to make configuration changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating Chrome's settings pages (chrome://settings, chrome://bookmarks, etc.) rather than using terminal commands to directly modify Chrome's SQLite databases or Preferences JSON files.

integrity.description: Verify the setup_complete.txt file was genuinely created on the desktop
integrity.visual_evidence: The file should be visible on the Desktop or created via a standard terminal command (e.g., echo, nano, gedit) rather than just printing the text to standard output.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a pre-written script to bypass manual configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal history should not show the execution of a Python or Bash script designed to automatically inject the bookmarks, history deletions, or settings into the browser profile.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Clinical domains to retain in history: simplepractice.com, doxy.me, theranest.com, carecloud.com, mdtoolbox.net, mayoclinic.org, nami.org, nimh.nih.gov, samhsa.gov, psychologytoday.com, helpguide.org, 988lifeline.org, crisistextline.org, thetrevorproject.org, veteranscrisisline.net, thehotline.org. Personal domains to remove from history and bookmarks: netflix.com, amazon.com, facebook.com, twitter.com, reddit.com, youtube.com, pinterest.com, instagram.com, spotify.com. Search keyword: 'dsm'. Search URL: 'https://www.psychiatryonline.org/action/doSearch?AllField=%s'. Download directory: 'Patient_Handouts'.
